steps: "File refund claim with Dutch tax authorities using IB 92 form for excess withholding on Unilever NV dividend",
"Submit documentation showing Norwegian tax residency to claim NL-NO treaty rate of 15% vs 25% withheld",
"Calculate refund: EUR 22,193.60 representing 10% excess tax on EUR 221,936 gross dividend",
"Follow up with ABN AMRO Custody on status and provide copy of refund filing for account records"

references.title: Belastingdienst – Recipient of Dividend Outside Netherlands – Refund
